_comment: Claude Code Audio Hooks - Default Configuration Template (v5.0.3)
_description: This file is the default template for user_preferences.json. Plugin installs auto-copy this to ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/user_preferences.json on first read. AI agents should NOT edit this file directly — use 'audio-hooks set <key> <value>' instead.
_comment_audio_theme: Audio theme: 'default' for voice recordings, 'custom' for non-voice chimes. Change this one line to switch all audio.

enabled_hooks._comment_notification: Plays when Claude needs authorization or plan confirmation - HIGHLY RECOMMENDED
enabled_hooks._comment_stop: Plays when Claude finishes responding - RECOMMENDED
enabled_hooks._comment_pretooluse: Plays before Claude executes a tool (can be noisy) - OPTIONAL
enabled_hooks._comment_posttooluse: Plays after each tool execution (very noisy) - OPTIONAL
enabled_hooks._comment_userpromptsubmit: Plays when you submit a prompt - OPTIONAL
enabled_hooks._comment_subagent_stop: Plays when subagent tasks complete - RECOMMENDED for heavy users
enabled_hooks._comment_precompact: Plays before conversation history compaction - OPTIONAL
enabled_hooks._comment_session_start: Plays when Claude Code session starts - OPTIONAL
enabled_hooks._comment_session_end: Plays when Claude Code session ends - OPTIONAL
enabled_hooks._comment_permission_request: Plays when permission dialog appears ('Allow this bash command?') - HIGHLY RECOMMENDED
enabled_hooks._comment_posttoolusefailure: Plays when a tool execution fails - OPTIONAL
enabled_hooks._comment_subagent_start: Plays when a background subagent is spawned - OPTIONAL
enabled_hooks._comment_teammate_idle: Plays when an Agent Teams teammate goes idle - OPTIONAL
enabled_hooks._comment_task_completed: Plays when an Agent Teams task is completed - OPTIONAL
enabled_hooks._comment_stop_failure: Plays when API error occurs (rate limit, auth failure, etc.) - OPTIONAL
enabled_hooks._comment_postcompact: Plays after context compaction completes - OPTIONAL
enabled_hooks._comment_config_change: Plays when configuration files change during session - OPTIONAL
enabled_hooks._comment_instructions_loaded: Plays when CLAUDE.md or rules files are loaded - OPTIONAL
enabled_hooks._comment_worktree_create: Plays when a worktree is created for isolated tasks - OPTIONAL
enabled_hooks._comment_worktree_remove: Plays when a worktree is removed/cleaned up - OPTIONAL
enabled_hooks._comment_elicitation: Plays when an MCP server requests user input - RECOMMENDED
enabled_hooks._comment_elicitation_result: Plays after user responds to an MCP elicitation - OPTIONAL
enabled_hooks._comment_permission_denied: v5.0: Plays when auto mode classifier denies a tool call - RECOMMENDED
enabled_hooks._comment_cwd_changed: v5.0: Plays when working directory changes - OPTIONAL (noisy)
enabled_hooks._comment_file_changed: v5.0: Plays when a watched file changes on disk - OPTIONAL (configure file_changed.watch)
enabled_hooks._comment_task_created: v5.0: Plays when a task is created via TaskCreate - RECOMMENDED

playback_settings._comment_queue: Enable audio queue to prevent overlapping sounds
playback_settings._comment_max_queue: Maximum number of audio notifications in queue
playback_settings._comment_debounce: Minimum milliseconds between same notification type (prevents spam)

notification_settings._comment: Desktop notification mode: audio_only, notification_only, audio_and_notification, disabled
notification_settings._comment_detail: Notification detail: 'minimal' (hook name only), 'standard' (tool + brief context), 'verbose' (full command text)
notification_settings._comment_per_hook: Per-hook mode overrides. Omit a hook to use the global mode above.

filters._comment: Per-hook regex filters on stdin JSON fields. Suffix '_exclude' inverts. Example: posttoolusefailure: {"tool_name": "Bash|Write"}

webhook_settings._comment: Send hook events to external services. Formats: slack, discord, teams, ntfy, raw

focus_flow._comment: Micro-task anti-distraction during Claude's thinking time. Modes: breathing, hydration, url, command, disabled

rate_limit_alerts._comment: v5.0: Play a one-shot warning when stdin rate_limits cross thresholds. Marker-debounced per (window, threshold, resets_at).

statusline_settings._comment: Controls which segments appear in the Claude Code status line. Set visible_segments to an array of segment names to show only those. Empty array or omission shows all segments.

tts_settings._comment: Text-to-speech mode - speaks context-aware messages. Requires: macOS (say), Linux (espeak/spd-say), Windows (SAPI)
tts_settings._comment_speak_assistant_message: v5.0: When true, stop/subagent_stop hooks speak the actual last_assistant_message instead of the static message below. Off by default for privacy.

_usage_notes: 2. Enable 'pretooluse' only if you want notifications before EVERY tool execution
3. 'posttooluse' is very noisy - enable only for debugging
4. To disable a notification, set its value to false in enabled_hooks
5. To use custom audio, place MP3 files in audio/custom/ and update paths
6. Audio files should be 1-3 seconds long for best experience
8. Run 'scripts/test-audio.sh' to test all enabled notifications
9. notification_settings.mode controls audio vs desktop notifications vs both
